title: The Lost Puppy
text: Tom found a small puppy near the school gate. The puppy looked scared and hungry. Tom gave it some water and asked his teacher for help. Together, they found the owner. The owner thanked Tom for being kind.
discussionGoals: Retell the story in simple past tense.
Use at least three anchor keywords.

title: A Garden on Mars
text: Mia is a young scientist living on Mars. She wants to grow vegetables inside a glass dome. Every morning, she checks the water, light, and temperature. Her dream is to make fresh food for everyone in the Mars station.
discussionGoals: Talk about growing food in space.
